APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS MAGELLAN HEALTH SERVICES OF CALIFORNIA, INC. - EMPLOYER SERVICES, AND HUMAN AFFAIRS INTERNATIONAL OF CALIFORNIA VIA COURTCALL. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTS PARTIES' STIPULATED MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 11/1/21 IS CONTINUED TO 5/2/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES, DISCOVERY AND MOTION PRACTICE INCLUDING 2034 CCP EXPERT DISCOVERY SHALL BE GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT AND MOVING PARTY TO SERVE THE ORDER. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

The verified application of Joshua R. Hess to appear as counsel pro hac vice to defendants is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Order is signed.
